extortion.description: pttphilippines.com zoominfo.com/c/ptt-philippines-corp/353484173 PTT Philippines Corporation, a subsidiary of Thailand's PTT Oil and Retail Business Public Company Limited, specializes in the trading of petroleum products across retail, wholesale, and commercial markets. The company offers a range of high-performance fuels, lubricants, and services, aiming to enhance customer satisfaction and fuel efficiency. Targeting both individual consumers and businesses, PTT Philippines is committed to providing products of international standards while expanding its market presence in the Philippines. With a focus on innovation and quality, PTT Philippines also engages in corporate social responsibility initiatives to support local communities
